title: cynanchum haughtii
intro: Cynanchum haughtii, also known as Haught's swallowwort, is a species of flowering plant in the dogbane family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Cynanchum haughtii has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
